auth.label: API Key
auth.description: Quaderno API key used with HTTP Basic Auth. Create or view API keys in your Quaderno account: https://quadernoapp.com/users/api-keys

actions.name: calculate_tax_rate
actions.description: Calculate the Quaderno tax rate for an address and transaction details.

from_country.description: The seller's two-letter ISO country code.

from_postal_code.description: The seller's ZIP or postal code.

to_country.description: The customer's two-letter ISO country code.

to_postal_code.description: The customer's ZIP or postal code.

product_type.description: Whether the product is a good or service.

date.description: The transaction date. Defaults to today in Quaderno.

inputSchema.description: Input for calculating a Quaderno tax rate.

anyOf.description: The percentage of the subtotal used for calculating the tax amount.
The country used for the tax calculation.
The region used for the tax calculation.
The tax code used for the calculation.
Whether prices were treated as inclusive or exclusive.

taxRate.description: A normalized Quaderno tax rate calculation.

outputSchema.description: A Quaderno tax rate calculation response.

first_name.description: The contact's first name. Required by Quaderno when creating a contact.

last_name.description: The contact's last name when the contact is a person.

country.description: The two-letter ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code.

contact.description: The Quaderno contact fields to create or update.

inputSchema.description: Input for creating a Quaderno contact.

anyOf.description: The contact kind, such as company or person.
The external payment processor ID for the contact.

name.description: The product name displayed to customers.

unit_cost.description: The unit amount charged for the product.

product_type.description: Whether the product is a good or a service.

tax_class.description: The tax class that applies to the product.

product.description: The Quaderno product fields to create or update.

inputSchema.description: Input for creating a Quaderno product.

anyOf.description: The unit amount charged for the product.
The product type, such as good or service.
The tax class that applies to the product.

inputSchema.description: Input for deleting a Quaderno contact.

deleted.description: Whether Quaderno accepted the delete request.

inputSchema.description: Input for deleting a Quaderno product.

deleted.description: Whether Quaderno accepted the delete request.

actions.name: get_account
actions.description: Retrieve the Quaderno account identity and API endpoint for the API key.

inputSchema.description: Input for retrieving the Quaderno account identity.

accountUrl.description: The Quaderno account API base URL.

actions.name: get_contact
actions.description: Retrieve one Quaderno contact by ID.

inputSchema.description: Input for retrieving a Quaderno contact.

anyOf.description: The contact kind, such as company or person.
The external payment processor ID for the contact.

actions.name: get_product
actions.description: Retrieve one Quaderno product by ID.

inputSchema.description: Input for retrieving a Quaderno product.

anyOf.description: The unit amount charged for the product.
The product type, such as good or service.
The tax class that applies to the product.

actions.name: list_contacts
actions.description: List Quaderno contacts with optional search or processor ID filters.

q.description: A case-sensitive search query accepted by Quaderno.

anyOf.description: The contact kind, such as company or person.
The external payment processor ID for the contact.
The URL for the next page when Quaderno provides one.
The URL for the previous page when Quaderno provides one.
The URL for the first page when Quaderno provides one.
The URL for the last page when Quaderno provides one.
The Quaderno request limit for the current window.
The number of Quaderno requests remaining in the current window.
The UTC epoch second when the Quaderno rate limit window resets.

pagination.description: Pagination links and rate limit metadata returned by Quaderno.

actions.name: list_products
actions.description: List Quaderno products with an optional search query.

q.description: A case-sensitive search query accepted by Quaderno.

anyOf.description: The unit amount charged for the product.
The product type, such as good or service.
The tax class that applies to the product.
The URL for the next page when Quaderno provides one.

The URL for the first page when Quaderno provides one.

actions.name: update_contact
actions.description: Update a Quaderno contact. Fields not provided are left unchanged.

last_name.description: The contact's last name when the contact is a person.

country.description: The two-letter ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code.

contact.description: The Quaderno contact fields to create or update.

inputSchema.description: Input for updating a Quaderno contact.

anyOf.description: The contact kind, such as company or person.
The external payment processor ID for the contact.

actions.name: update_product
actions.description: Update a Quaderno product. Fields not provided are left unchanged.

name.description: The product name displayed to customers.

unit_cost.description: The unit amount charged for the product.

product_type.description: Whether the product is a good or a service.

tax_class.description: The tax class that applies to the product.

product.description: The Quaderno product fields to create or update.

inputSchema.description: Input for updating a Quaderno product.

anyOf.description: The unit amount charged for the product.
The product type, such as good or service.
